evidence: "A must see action movie! Plenty of action and drama!"
"Excellent action flick! A real tense, white knuckler of a movie!"
"A good popcorn flick, not something one might want to repeatedly watch."
"The story line is a bit vague and loose."
"Fast-paced with excellent story line! An edge of your seat ride!"
"Well scripted, excellent actors, and musical score made me forget all except living with the characters in the movie!"
"First went to the theater, then had to add it to our collection!"
"A must see movie! Especially if action movies are a favorite!"
"I was living the moment locked in time with Hugh Jackman, Russell Crowe, Anne Hathaway, et al."
"Add action with humor and Guardians of the Galaxy does it all!!"
"But you may have to get out the kleenex box though...."
"A very sweet film! The period is just about the turn of the 1900's."

summary: The user has a strong preference for action and drama films, often enjoying fast-paced narratives with high production quality. They appreciate emotional engagement in movies, indicating a taste for stories that resonate on a personal level.
